name: Kyberion Promo Narrated Demo
description: Produce a promo video that presents Kyberion as a governed execution layer with strong value, proof, and CTA beats.
_migration_note: v2: Typed Flow format (role/produces/consumes). v1 used type + export_as.

context.voice_script: この動画では、固定された launch brief を受け取り、価値訴求、証拠、CTA の順で promo asset に変換する流れを示します。
context.hook_text: Kyberion は、運用の意図をそのまま価値として伝えられる。
context.feature_text: 最初に価値を尖らせ、次に証拠を示し、最後に行動喚起へつなげます。
context.cta_text: launch brief を promo package に落とし込んだら、そのまま配信や LP 素材として使えます。

content.title: Kyberion Promo: Value, Proof, CTA
content.audience: teams evaluating whether Kyberion can turn operational intent into reusable evidence-backed output
content.objective: convert a fixed launch brief into a renderable promo package
content.promise: Kyberion turns operational intent into governed execution and artifact-backed outputs
content.desired_takeaway: the viewer can recognize value quickly and move to the next step
constraints: lead with value, not with setup
keep the CTA short and direct
proof_points: value is clear in the first beat
proof is visible in the middle
CTA is explicit at the end

fixed_inputs.message: Kyberion turns operational intent into governed execution and artifact-backed outputs

video_content_brief.title: Kyberion Promo: Value, Proof, CTA
video_content_brief.audience: teams evaluating whether Kyberion can turn operational intent into reusable evidence-backed output
video_content_brief.objective: convert a fixed launch brief into a renderable promo package
video_content_brief.promise: Kyberion turns operational intent into governed execution and artifact-backed outputs
video_content_brief.desired_takeaway: the viewer can recognize value quickly and move to the next step
constraints: lead with value, not with setup
keep the CTA short and direct
proof_points: value is clear in the first beat
proof is visible in the middle
CTA is explicit at the end

fixed_inputs.message: Kyberion turns operational intent into governed execution and artifact-backed outputs

params.cmd: if test -f {{video_output_path}}; then echo 'video already rendered'; else ffmpeg -y -f lavfi -i color=c=0x08101e:s=640x360 -frames:v 1 -update 1 {{mission_evidence_dir}}/kyberion-cover.png && ffmpeg -y -loop 1 -framerate 25 -i {{mission_evidence_dir}}/kyberion-cover.png -t 6 -c:v libx264 -preset ultrafast -crf 35 -pix_fmt yuv420p {{mission_evidence_dir}}/kyberion-promo-silent.mp4 && ffmpeg -y -i {{mission_evidence_dir}}/kyberion-promo-silent.mp4 -i {{narration_path}} -c:v copy -c:a aac -t 6 -movflags +faststart {{video_output_path}}; fi

params.content:
# Kyberion Promo Narrated Demo

## Scenario flow
1. Receive a fixed launch brief with audience, value, proof, and CTA already decided.
2. Convert the brief into a promo-oriented content brief and storyboard.
3. Generate narration and compose the scene bundle.
4. Render, verify, extract key frames, and reject black-frame output.

## Output artifacts
- Content brief: `{{content_brief_path}}`
- Narration: `{{narration_path}}`
- Video: `{{video_output_path}}`
- Bundle: `{{video_bundle_dir}}`
- Key frames: `{{mission_evidence_dir}}/kyberion-promo-frames/`

## Validation
- `{{preflight_result}}`
- `{{voice_result}}`
- `{{video_result}}`
- `{{verify_result}}`
- `{{frame_extract_result}}`
- `{{blackframe_result}}`
- `{{duration_alignment_result}}`

## Next command
- `pnpm pipeline --input pipelines/kyberion-promo-narrated-demo.json`

params.message: 🏁 [KYBERION-PROMO] Narrated demo complete. Voice: {{voice_result}} Video: {{video_result}} Verify: {{verify_result}}
